Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The shelf is filled with all kinds of products...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I'll buy something later... In any[n]case, I should go to the faculty office now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like some products[n]are already sold out.[n]{f 1 1}
